summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GERdoctor iteration 14 features. All new desktop User Dashboard layout changes are working correctly: single horizontal row of steps with horizontal scrolling, unified continuous progress bar at top, and 'Your Progress' bar removed. Mobile view unchanged and working. Admin Settings and Partner Dashboard logos verified.
passed_tests: User Dashboard desktop: All 8 steps displayed in SINGLE horizontal flex row (not wrapping grid)
User Dashboard desktop: Unified continuous progress bar at top spanning all steps as ONE 5px bar
User Dashboard desktop: No separate 'Your Progress' / 'Ihr Fortschritt' bar exists
User Dashboard desktop: Horizontal scrolling works at 1024px viewport (scrollWidth 1120 > clientWidth 958)
User Dashboard desktop: Active step highlighted with bg-[#114f55]/5 background
User Dashboard desktop: Step navigation works - clicking steps navigates correctly
User Dashboard desktop: Step content area renders form fields correctly (10 fields found)
User Dashboard desktop: Save Progress and Complete & Continue buttons present and functional
User Dashboard mobile (390px): Vertical accordion layout with 8 step containers
User Dashboard mobile: Vertical progress line on left side working
User Dashboard mobile: Accordion expand/collapse working correctly
User Dashboard mobile: Form fields and buttons render correctly in expanded accordion
Landing page: GERdoctor logo shows correctly in header
Admin Dashboard: GERdoctor logo with ADMIN badge visible
Admin Dashboard: Settings tab works - shows Site Title, Meta Description, Logo Configuration, Contact Email, Primary Color, Footer Text
Admin Dashboard: Settings Save button works
Partner Dashboard: GERdoctor logo with PARTNER badge visible
Partner Dashboard: User Submissions table working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data from iteration 13
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 changed the desktop User Dashboard layout: grid replaced with single horizontal flex row with overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling, individual step progress bars replaced with one unified 5px progress bar at top, 'Your Progress' section removed. Mobile accordion view unchanged. All features working correctly. Backend unchanged from iteration 13.
screenshots: .screenshots/desktop_dashboard.png - Desktop dashboard with single horizontal row of 8 steps
.screenshots/desktop_1024px.png - Desktop at 1024px showing horizontal scroll capability
.screenshots/mobile_step_content.png - Mobile step content with form fields
.screenshots/admin_settings_tab.png - Admin Settings tab with all configuration fields
